burn(uint256).details: Emits a Transfer event with a destination of 0x00

params.value: The amount that will be burned

mint(address,uint256).details: Emits a Transfer event originating from 0x00

params.to: The account that will receive the created tokens
params.value: The amount that will be created

setMinter(address).details: Only callable once, when minter has not yet been set

updateMiningParameters().details: Callable by any address, but only once per epoch        Total supply becomes slightly larger if this function is called late

availableSupply().notice: Current number of tokens in existence (claimed or unclaimed)

futureEpochTimeWrite().notice: Get timestamp of the next mining epoch start while simultaneously updating mining parameters

mint(address,uint256).notice: Mint `value` tokens and assign them to `to`

mintableInTimeframe(uint256,uint256).notice: How much supply is mintable from start timestamp till end timestamp

updateMiningParameters().notice: Update mining rate and supply at the start of the epoch
